help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shopping with us
help.shipping_desc: We offer complimentary express shipping on all orders worldwide. Standard delivery takes 2–5 business days, while express delivery is available within 1–2 business days. All shipments are fully tracked and insured.
help.returns_desc: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be in their original condition and packaging. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after we receive the returned item. For defective products, we cover all return shipping costs.
help.payment_desc: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers. All payments are processed through secure, encrypted connections. Your financial information is never stored on our servers.
help.contact_desc: Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to assist you. For administrative inquiries, our office hours are Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST. Reach us via email, phone, or through the contact form below.
help.faq_q1: How do I track my order?
help.faq_a1: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can use this number on our website or the carrier's site to track your package in real time.
help.faq_q2: Can I change or cancel my order?
help.faq_a2: Orders can be modified or canceled within 1 hour of placement. After that, the order enters processing and can no longer be changed. Please contact support immediately if you need to make changes.
help.faq_a3: Yes, we ship to over 100 countries worldwide. International delivery typically takes 5–10 business days. Customs duties and taxes may apply depending on your country's regulations.
help.faq_a4: All products come with a minimum 1-year manufacturer's warranty. Premium electronics may include extended warranty options. The warranty covers manufacturing defects but not accidental damage or normal wear and tear.
help.faq_q5: How do I contact customer support?
help.faq_a5: You can reach us 24/7 via email at hello@luxe.com, by phone at +1 (555) 123-4567, or by filling out the contact form on this page. We typically respond within a few hours during business hours.
help.contact_success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you shortly.
help.contact_error: Please fill in all required fields.
